# Security Checklist: Fall Back to Straight-Line Distance When Routing Fails

**Purpose**: Validate controlled failures and traceability.
**Created**: 2026-03-11
**Feature**: `specs/027-straight-line-fallback/spec.md`

**Note**: This checklist is generated by the `/prompts:speckit.checklist` workflow.

## Error Handling

- [x] CHK-SEC-001 Disabled fallback returns HTTP 503 with controlled dependency error.
- [x] CHK-SEC-002 Invalid coordinates return HTTP 422 without computing distances.

## Traceability

- [x] CHK-SEC-003 Routing failures and fallback usage are logged with correlation IDs.
